name: Dried Tomato Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Lightly grease a baking sheet and set aside.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Using a pastry blender or your hands, cut in the butter until the mixture looks grainy, like coarse crumbs.
3. Pour milk into a well in the center of the mixture. Add dried tomatoes and mix until a soft, elastic dough forms. Do not overmix.
4. Knead dough lightly on a floured surface until smooth. Roll dough into a 3/4-inch thick pad.
5. Cut into 2-1/2 to 3-inch rounds with a glass or cookie cutter.
6. Bake on the prepared sheet for about 10 minutes, or until they rise and are golden.
